subject: Mathematics
source: Republic of Liberia Ministry of Education - National Curriculum for Grades 10-12

objectives: Define and identify set using set notation

content: Definition of set using set notation
Types of sets (infinite, finite, Universal, equal, equivalent)
Disjoint sets and complement of a set
